name: canuckduck
description: Canadian civic intelligence MCP server. RIPPLE causal policy graph (1,334 variables, 5,130+ edges), constitutional doctrine (46 doctrines, 165 CanLII cases), federal budget data (114 organizations), geospatial intelligence (5,161 municipalities, 338 ridings, 29,638 postal codes). Sovereign Canadian infrastructure.
author: CanuckDUCK Research Corporation

auth.description: Public tools require no auth. Registered/Professional tiers require Bearer token from nest.canuckduck.ca
